nodes.label: inteligentny-kalkulator-produkt-finalny.png
nodes.description: Marketing/gallery photo showing the final KalkMate product staged as a desktop study scene. A silver-and-black Esperanza electronic calculator (12 digits, branded 'KalkMate' on its dot-matrix display) sits at center on a white marble surface. Around it: an open chemistry textbook with equations (top-left), a white mug of black coffee (top-right), four pastel Stabilo-style highlighters in pink/yellow/green/blue (right), white wired earphones coiled below the calculator, a black smartphone (bottom-right), and three pastel sticky notes (pink, yellow, mint) with handwritten study labels 'MOLAR MASS', 'STOICHIOMETRY TEST', and 'REVIEW CH. 4'. Flat-lay top-down composition suggesting a student exam-prep / chemistry study aesthetic.
